titles.en: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months
Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months

segments: رَجَبٍ أَوْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَلْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَجَبٍ أَفْضَلُ.
arabic.text: رَجَبٍ أَوْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَلْ عُمْرَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَجَبٍ أَفْضَلُ.

segments:
Hadith.2949 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked:
"Which Umrah is better, an Umrah in the month of Rajab or an Umrah in the Month of Ramadan?"
Imam (as) said: "No, an Umrah in the month of Rajab is better."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2949 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) that he was asked:
"Which Umrah is better, an Umrah in the month of Rajab or an Umrah in the Month of Ramadan?"
Imam (as) said: "No, an Umrah in the month of Rajab is better."

narratorChain.raw: 2949 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ أَيُّ اَلْعُمْرَةِ أَفْضَلُ عُمْرَةٌ فِي

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ أَيُّ اَلْعُمْرَةِ أَفْضَلُ عُمْرَةٌ

titles.en: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months

segments: رَجُلٍ أَحْرَمَ فِي شَهْرٍ وَ أَحَلَّ فِي آخَرَ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ لَهُ فِي اَلَّذِي نَوَى » وَ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ لَهُ فِي أَفْضَلِهَا ».
arabic.text: رَجُلٍ أَحْرَمَ فِي شَهْرٍ وَ أَحَلَّ فِي آخَرَ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ لَهُ فِي اَلَّذِي نَوَى » وَ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ لَهُ فِي أَفْضَلِهَا ».

segments:
Hadith.2950 - It was narrated from Abdul-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who enters Ihram in one month and exits Ihram in another month.
Imam (as) said: "He will be rewarded according to his intention."
And Imam (as) also said: "He will be rewarded for the better of the two months."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2950 - It was narrated from Abdul-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who enters Ihram in one month and exits Ihram in another month.
Imam (as) said: "He will be rewarded according to his intention."
And Imam (as) also said: "He will be rewarded for the better of the two months."

narratorChain.raw: 2950 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ : فِي

parts.text: 2950 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ : فِي

titles.en: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months

segments: رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا أَحْرَمْتَ وَ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ رَجَبٍ يَوْمٌ وَ لَيْلَةٌ فَعُمْرَتُكَ رَجَبِيَّةٌ.
arabic.text: رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا أَحْرَمْتَ وَ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ رَجَبٍ يَوْمٌ وَ لَيْلَةٌ فَعُمْرَتُكَ رَجَبِيَّةٌ.

segments:
Hadith.2951 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"If you enter Ihram with one day and night remaining in the month of Rajab, your Umrah will be considered a Rajabi Umrah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2951 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"If you enter Ihram with one day and night remaining in the month of Rajab, your Umrah will be considered a Rajabi Umrah."

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلَامُ قَالَ:

parts.text: َفِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلَامُ قَالَ:
